stories.headline: Grinex Halts Trading After $15M State-Level Attack Drains USDT Reserves
stories.tldr: Sanctioned Russian exchange Grinex suspended trading after attackers moved $15M in USDT onto Tron and Ethereum, blaming a hostile-state operation.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Grinex is widely treated as the post-Garantex reincarnation of Russia's sanctioned rails, so a successful drain signals that even state-aligned off-ramps are losing their operational cover.
the_details: Elliptic traced roughly $15M in USDt leaving Grinex-linked wallets and converting into other assets across Tron and Ethereum soon after the theft.
Grinex blamed the breach on resources 'available only to entities of hostile states' and paused deposits, withdrawals and trading pending investigation.
Russian reports peg losses near 1B rubles, with outflows routed into ETH and TRX to complicate on-chain tracing.

stories.headline: Drift Relaunches as USDT Perps DEX After $148M Tether-Led Rescue
stories.tldr: Solana-based Drift secured $148M from Tether and partners to reopen as a USDT-denominated perps DEX after last month's $285M North Korean exploit.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A Tether-underwritten bailout of a flagship Solana perps venue sets a template for private rescues replacing insurance funds, and locks more DeFi liquidity into USDT's orbit.
the_details: TRM Labs attributed the April 1 Drift exploit to North Korean actors, making it the largest DeFi hack of 2026 and second-largest ever on Solana.
The $148M package from Tether and partners backstops more than $270M in exploited client assets as Drift pivots to USDT-settled perps.
Relaunch keeps the venue on Solana, preserving the chain's lead in on-chain perps volume after February's record $650B month.

stories.headline: BTC Stalls Below $76K as $450M in Sell Orders Cap Breakout Attempt
stories.tldr: Bitcoin opened near $75,150 but ran into $450M of sell-side liquidity overhead as derivatives data flashed caution and liquidations ticked up.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A visible supply wall right at the breakout level tells traders the next leg needs a macro catalyst, not just spot bid — setting up today's Waller speech as a volatility trigger.
the_details: BTC opened at $75,152 on Friday, 0.5% above Thursday's $74,811, with ETH slipping 0.5% to $2,348.
Total crypto market cap sits at $2.63T on $120.3B of 24h volume, up 0.6% on the day.
Fed Governor Christopher Waller speaks on the Economic Outlook at 14:00 ET, the next macro catalyst in front of the $76K level.

stories.headline: Mercado Libre Shutters Mercado Coin, Ending LatAm's Largest E-Commerce Token
stories.tldr: From today, Mercado Libre users can no longer buy, sell or earn cashback in Mercado Coin, retiring the biggest homegrown crypto in Latin American commerce.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: If the region's dominant e-commerce platform can't make a captive token stick, the 'branded stablecoin for loyalty' thesis takes a real hit just as banks consider their own launches.
the_details: Mercado Coin cashback, buy and sell functionality is disabled starting April 17 across Mercado Libre's markets.
The shutdown leaves Mercado Pago's fiat and stablecoin rails as the sole crypto-adjacent consumer product for the group.
Move follows broader LatAm consolidation around USDT and USDC as default dollar rails over retailer-issued tokens.

stories.headline: DeBridge Unlocks $9.2M in DBR, Inflating Circulating Supply by 12.9%
stories.tldr: DeBridge releases 12.9% of circulating DBR — about $9.19M at current prices — into the market today, the largest single-event unlock on the calendar.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A double-digit supply jolt on a mid-cap interop token is a live test of how well private OTC desks are absorbing unlocks this cycle, with read-through to LayerZero and Wormhole peers.
the_details: DBR unlock size: 12.9% of circulating supply, worth approximately $9.19M at pre-event prices.
Unlock lands as interop tokens face rising competition from Solana-native bridges and LayerZero V2 integrations.
Price action into the unlock will set the tone for Q2's unlock schedule across bridge protocols.
